competencies.name: Basic Airway Management

competencies.name: Endotracheal Tube Care

competencies.name: King LTS-D Insertion

competencies.name: Mechanical Ventilation - Home Vent

competencies.name: Mechanical Ventilation - ICN

competencies.name: Nasal Packing Removal

competencies.name: Naso/Oropharyngeal Suctioning

competencies.name: Suction Equipment

competencies.name: Infant Positioning
competencies.description: Therapeutic infant positioning, including supine, side-lying, and prone alignment to support midline orientation, hand-to-mouth behavior, and skin protection.

competencies.name: Kangaroo Care Standing Transfer
competencies.description: Standing kangaroo-care transfer of the neonate to the parent, including parental teaching, staff coordination, lighting adjustment, and infant containment during transfer.

competencies.name: Kangaroo Care – Sitting Transfer
competencies.description: Sitting kangaroo-care transfer of the neonate to the parent, including parental teaching, staff coordination, lighting adjustment, and infant containment during transfer.

competencies.name: OB Positioning - L&D
competencies.description: OB patient positioning for L&D surgical procedures, including aseptic technique, safe anatomical positioning, padding, and managing potential positioning-related complications.

competencies.name: OR Positioning
competencies.description: Safe surgical positioning of the patient (supine, lithotomy, lateral, prone, jackknife, etc.), including padding, alignment, safety straps, and prevention of skin, nerve, and circulatory injury.

competencies.name: Patient Positioning - Allen/Yellowfin Stirrups
competencies.description: Patient positioning in Allen/Yellowfin stirrups, including stirrup-holder setup, simultaneous leg placement, padding to protect nerves, and equal height/flexion.

competencies.name: Patient Positioning - Candy Cane Stirrups
competencies.description: Patient positioning in candy-cane stirrups, including stirrup-holder and strap setup, simultaneous leg placement, and equal height/flexion after pelvis lift.

competencies.name: Patient Positioning - Orthopedic Procedures
competencies.description: Patient positioning for orthopedic procedures, including ProFx table use, traction, padding of pressure points, ESU grounding pad placement, and steri-drape application.

competencies.name: Hare Traction
competencies.description: Application of Hare traction for femur injuries, including pre- and post-application neurovascular assessment, splint sizing, ankle strap and hitch application, and hourly reassessment.

competencies.name: Pneumatic AntiShock Garment (PASG)
competencies.description: Application and controlled deflation of the pneumatic anti-shock garment (PASG), including indications, sequential inflation of lower compartments, and VS-guided abdominal compartment deflation.

competencies.name: Traction
competencies.description: Application and management of skeletal or skin traction, including pre/post neurovascular assessment, weight selection, alignment, and safe equipment setup.

competencies.name: Traction - LF
competencies.description: Application of traction on Life Flight, including neurovascular assessment, splint sizing, ankle strap and padding application, and hourly reassessment.

competencies.name: Continuous Passive Motion
competencies.description: Use of the continuous passive motion (CPM) device, including pain assessment, Physical Therapy collaboration, alignment, settings, and reportable conditions.

competencies.name: Knee Immobilizer
competencies.description: Application of the knee immobilizer, including patient population, pain assessment, Physical Therapy collaboration, alignment, settings, and reportable conditions.

competencies.name: Lateral Transfer
competencies.description: Safe lateral transfer of patients, including environmental check, body mechanics, wheelchair and stretcher transfer techniques, and safe transport equipment positioning.

competencies.name: Crutches - Fitting and Walking
competencies.description: Crutch fitting and ambulation teaching, including measurement, fit verification with 2-finger axillary gap, and crutch stance and gait demonstration.

competencies.name: Splinting
competencies.description: Application of splints, including indications, limb assessment, alignment, splint type selection, skin-breakdown prevention, post-application assessment, and patient teaching.

competencies.name: Walker/Crutches
competencies.description: Walker and crutch ambulation teaching, including weight-bearing status, bed-to-stand, stand-to-seated, ambulation, car transfer, and fall-prevention safety techniques.

competencies.name: Diapering - ICN
competencies.description: Developmentally supportive diapering in the ICN, including cue-based timing, swaddled containment, and gentle technique to minimize stress.

competencies.name: Isolette Bath - ICN
competencies.description: Developmentally supportive isolette bath in the ICN, including swaddled bathing, sequential exposure of one body part at a time, and washing the hair last.

competencies.name: Tub Bath - ICN
competencies.description: Developmentally supportive tub bath in the ICN, including swaddled immersion, sequential exposure of one body part at a time, and washing the hair last.

competencies.name: Ostomy Care
competencies.description: Ostomy care, including stoma type identification, peristomal skin assessment, pouching system application, skin-breakdown prevention, and WOC nurse consultation for new ostomies.

competencies.name: Duke Boot - Multilayer Compression Wrap
competencies.description: Application of the Duke Boot multilayer compression wrap, including provider-order verification, leg elevation, ointment application, and 50%-overlap/50%-tension wrapping technique.

competencies.name: Elastic Bandages - Ace Wrap
competencies.description: Application of elastic (Ace) bandages, including indications, sizing, limb-appropriate application technique, and patient teaching for home use.

competencies.name: Leech Therapy
competencies.description: Medicinal leech therapy for venous congestion, including leech maintenance, site preparation, application, emergency removal, and documentation.

competencies.name: Incision Care - Ambulatory
competencies.description: Ambulatory incision care, including wound type identification, closure inspection, clean or sterile dressing changes, drainage management, and consultation with wound resources.

competencies.name: Negative Pressure Wound Therapy (NPWT)
competencies.description: Negative pressure wound therapy (NPWT), including indications, contraindications, machine programming, canister changes, alarm troubleshooting, documentation, and home-use teaching.

competencies.name: Initiates Negative Pressure Wound Therapy (NPWT) - OR
competencies.description: Initiating NPWT in the OR, including patient contraindications, machine operation, dressing seal maintenance, and alarm troubleshooting.

competencies.name: Initiates Negative Pressure Wound Therapy (NPWT) - OR - ASC
competencies.description: Initiating NPWT in the OR at the ASC, including verifying patient-supplied equipment, ASC backup availability, device setup, and alarm troubleshooting.

competencies.name: Negative Pressure Wound Therapy (NPWT) - PACU
competencies.description: NPWT management in the PACU, including indications, contraindications, machine programming, alarm troubleshooting, and documentation.

competencies.name: Negative Pressure Wound Therapy (NPWT) - Dressing Change
competencies.description: NPWT dressing change, including parameters for nurse vs. provider performance, sterile technique, wound documentation, and reportable conditions.

competencies.name: Wound Care
competencies.description: General wound care, including assessment, measurement, clean or sterile dressing changes, wound irrigation, drainage management, and consultation with wound resources.

competencies.name: Wound Care - Ambulatory
competencies.description: Ambulatory wound care, including skin/wound assessment, clean or sterile dressing changes, output measurement, suction maintenance, and patency flushing.

competencies.name: Wound Management Device
competencies.description: Use of a wound management device, including indications, appropriate procedure selection, drainage management, output measurement, and consultation with wound resources.

competencies.name: Staple Removal
competencies.description: Removal of surgical staples, including order verification, incision inspection, CHG skin prep, staple-remover technique, steri-strip application, and patient teaching.

competencies.name: Suture Removal
competencies.description: Removal of surgical sutures (intermittent and continuous), including order verification, incision inspection, CHG skin prep, atraumatic removal technique, and patient teaching.
